data.name: FRESHMAN: Project SEX 🔞
data.detailed_description:
College. Parties. Weird clubs. Questionable life choices.

FRESHMAN: Project SEX is an adult visual novel about university life, bad decisions, and a very questionable bet that could change your entire semester.



You play as an average university student stuck somewhere in the middle — not nerdy enough for the geeks, not confident enough for the campus elites. But that’s about to change.

After a reckless bet with your best friend, you now have one semester to prove you can become a true campus legend. The challenge? Impress the women on a list your friend creates — each one very different, and none of them easy.

There’s just one problem.

Most of them belong to the nerdiest corners of campus.



Board game nights, chaotic DnD sessions, anime clubs, late-night hangouts, and bizarre student communities suddenly become your battlefield. To win their attention, you’ll have to dive deep into their world… while somehow keeping your reputation alive among the rest of campus.

Will you become a campus icon…
or completely lose yourself in the chaos of university life?



Either way — the semester is about to get very spicy.

🔥 Features

📖 Adult visual novel set in a chaotic university environment
🔥 Hot scenes to unlock as you progress through the story
💋 A colorful cast of characters, each with their own personality, hobbies, and secrets
😏 Plenty of awkward, spicy, and hilarious campus situations
🎲 Nerd culture adventures — board games, DnD nights, clubs, and more
⚡ Fast-paced and intuitive gameplay with story-driven choices
🔞 Explicit humor and mature themes intended only for players 18+

😉 Designed for comfortable one-hand gameplay (just saying)

data.short_description: FRESHMAN: Project SEX is an adult visual novel about university life, risky bets, and nerdy adventures. Meet campus girls from anime clubs, DnD sessions, and board game nights while trying to build your reputation on campus before the semester ends. Choices, chaos, and spicy encounters await. 🔞
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
